name: How do I know if my lawyer in LA is using ChatGPT without telling me?
description: Ask directly and review docs for errors; disclosure builds trust.[1]

mainEntity.name: How do I know if my lawyer in LA is using ChatGPT without telling me?

acceptedAnswer.text: Ask directly and review docs for errors; disclosure builds trust.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Signs include unusually fast drafting of complex documents or generic phrasing; ask directly about AI use in your case.[1] Ethical considerations suggest disclosure, especially if impacting work product, but no universal mandate exists.[1] Key factors: Review outputs for inaccuracies; check billing for efficiency gains; firm policies on AI. Request a meeting to discuss tools used and verification processes; insist on transparency for trust. If unsatisfied, seek new counsel.
